title: Migrate kill tests to ginkgo
body:
Migrate kill tests to the ginkgo suite and remove the
podman_kill bats.

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body: LGTM, though we definitely need to do a pass over our integration tests once they're all converted over and we can really take advantage of Ginkgo

LGTM, the more of the ginkgo tests I see, the better I like it!
Red Hat CI is unhappy without any clues as to what's wrong.  Retest?

:pushpin: Commit f46c9bc has been approved by `baude`
